name: quadwork
description: Unified dashboard for multi-agent coding teams — 4 AI agents, one terminal

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags && VERSION=$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') && gh release create "v$VERSION" --generate-notes --latest && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags && VERSION=$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') && gh release create "v$VERSION" --generate-notes --latest && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags && VERSION=$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') && gh release create "v$VERSION" --generate-notes --latest && npm publish
